The expert’s behavior—focusing on persuading and promoting their solution—aligns with the **Salesperson Type**, where the emphasis is on selling or advocating for their approach rather than purely explaining or narrating. This style prioritizes convincing the audience over neutral presentation or procedural clarity. The other options (Procedure, Storyteller, Godfather) don’t match the described "dancing" or persuasive tone.
